nodes.name: Deliver Answer + Log to Google Sheets

parameters.content:
### Receive Inbound Webhook

Entry point: listens for POST calls on `/wf03318-document`. Use the TEST url while building, switch callers to the PRODUCTION url after publishing.

Next: Reason & Act (AI Agent)

### Reason & Act (AI Agent)

The AI brain: reads the input, decides which attached tools to call (and in what order), then composes the answer.

Next: Shape Agent Output

### Groq Chat Model

Chat model powering the AI step (model: `llama-3.3-70b-versatile`). Swap providers here without rewiring.

Feeds **Reason & Act (AI Agent)** as `languageModel`

ًں”‘ Groq API key

### Lookup API Data

Tool the agent can call to hit the REST API with parameters it chooses at runtime.

Feeds **Reason & Act (AI Agent)** as `tool`

### Think It Through

Scratchpad tool: lets the agent reason step-by-step before acting.

Feeds **Reason & Act (AI Agent)** as `tool`

### Shape Agent Output

Shapes the item: writes `answer`, `confidence`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Confident Enough?

### Confident Enough?

Two-way gate on `={{ $json.confidence }}`. TRUE continues the happy path, FALSE takes the alternate branch.

Ports: â‘ â†’ Deliver Answer + Log to Google Sheets آ· â‘،â†’ Escalate to Human Queue

### Deliver Answer + Log to Google Sheets

googleSheets â€” `append` operation against the connected account.

Next: Join Outcomes

â†» retries 3أ—/2s آ· ًں”‘ Google OAuth2 / service account

### Join Outcomes

Rejoins 2 branches into one stream (mode: append) so downstream logic runs once.

# Digest documents with Google Drive and Microsoft Teams automatically

**Pattern:** AI Summarize & Route آ· **Level:** Foundation آ· **Trigger:** Webhook

## What it does
Digest documents with Google Drive and Microsoft Teams automatically. It fires the moment an external system calls its webhook.

## Why it exists
Manual contracts is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Receive Inbound Webhook â†’ Reason & Act (AI Agent) â†’ Shape Agent Output â†’ Confident Enough? â†’ Deliver Answer + Log to Google Sheets â†’ Join Outcomes

## Use it for
- Teams that want to ai summarize & route without manual effort
- Anyone automating contracts in legal
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Removes copy-paste errors
- Has retries and error handling built in
- Standardizes the process every time

## Before first run
Connect credentials: Google OAuth2 / service account; Groq API key; Microsoft OAuth2.
Follow the color key: ًںں¦ entry آ· ًںںھ AI آ· ًںں« actions آ· â¬œ utilities آ· ًںں© outputs آ· ًںں¥ error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath â€” read those before editing.

## ًں”گ Security

Never trust inbound payloads: the webhook path is unguessable. Add header auth or IP allow-listing for defense in depth. Secrets live in n8n credentials â€” never in node parameters.

## ًں¤– AI cluster

Purple nodes form one AI unit: the root node orchestrates, sub-nodes plug in via typed ports (model / memory / tools / parser). Swap the chat model without rewiring anything else. Costs scale with tokens â€” keep prompts lean and cap iterations.

## ًں›  Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see ًں”‘ lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your contracts process. Every node card explains its role â€” safe to extend at any marked branch.
